summary: A nearly two-minute flat 2D animated explainer about counterfeit goods for holiday shoppers, narrated throughout by an instructional voiceover (online shoppers, a shuttered 'OUT OF BUSINESS / CLOSED FOREVER' store, a burning phone, hammer-and-chains imagery) and closing on the CBP logo with a QR code. It uses cartoon styling and is narrated consumer-safety instruction.
notable_text: OUT OF BUSINESS / CLOSED FOREVER; 'If it seems too good to be true, it probably is'; To learn more about the dangers of counterfeits and what you can do, visit U.S. Customs and Border Protection (cbp.gov/trade/fakegoodsrealdangers)
